Name: Nord Anglia Swiss Summer Camps
Tagline: For the best international Swiss summer camps, look no further than Nord Anglia Education. Our summer camps in Switzerland provide an unforgettable experience.
About: We're confident your child will achieve more than they ever thought possible at our school. Our friendly school team is ready to give you a warm welcome to your new Nord Anglia school.
Philosophy: Our summer camps combine the rich traditions of Swiss education with innovative teaching methods, fostering a nurturing environment. We emphasize personal growth and cultural exchange, ensuring each child thrives amidst the stunning backdrop of the Swiss Alps.
Outcomes: Nord Anglia’s premium international schools in the Americas, Asia, Europe and the Middle East offer a world-class education, which is expertly tailored to your child’s passions and ambitions.
Admissions: Whether you’re an expat moving abroad or already living locally, we’re on hand to help support you through the entire admissions process. Rest assured: we’re happy to tailor the experience to what works best for you and your family.
Quote: Along with great academic results, a Nord Anglia education means having the confidence, resilience and creativity to succeed at whatever you choose to do or be in life.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Our staff includes certified educators from Switzerland and abroad, specializing in subjects like languages, sciences, and arts. Many hold advanced degrees and have extensive experience in international education and summer camp environments.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: We prioritize student wellbeing through a comprehensive pastoral care system and dedicated counselors. Our house system fosters a supportive community, ensuring students feel secure and valued during their stay.
Performance.Academic Integration: The camp offers a diverse curriculum integrating elements of the Swiss Matura and IB programmes. Interactive workshops and experiential learning methods enhance critical thinking and global awareness among students.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates often excel in international competitions and gain entry to prestigious universities worldwide. Our tailored guidance and high academic standards prepare students for successful future endeavors.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Our campus boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including access to nearby ski slopes and modern sports halls. Students enjoy well-equipped science labs and a theatre for creative performances, all amidst the stunning Alpine scenery.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: We maintain high standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. Our advisory system ensures continuous feedback and supports student development in line with IB accreditation standards.
